# Handoff Prompt

Use this prompt with any compatible agent:

> Use the `/content-burst-publishing` skill for this repository. Keep the repo moving frame by frame: mine `idea4blog.md` for the next adjacent state transition, draft the next post or smallest coherent cluster under `_posts/`, update the public ledger, extend `tests/test_site.py`, run `python3 -m unittest -v tests.test_site`, publish to the public repo, verify the live GitHub Pages deployment, and then immediately choose the next frame from the newly rendered state until I tell you to stop. Treat the repo like a virtual SQL application whose databases progress one frame at a time, and act as the tick-tock that drives those frames forward.

## Short version

> Use `/content-burst-publishing`, move frame by frame, and keep pumping.
